Boa Hancock was the captain of the Kuja Pirates and the most beautiful woman in the world. Known as the Pirate Empress, she had long, black hair, piercing blue eyes, and a slender yet curvy figure that made her stand out everywhere. Boa ruled Amazon Lily, an island of warrior women who admired and protected her. But one day, Amazon Lily was attacked by a group of pirates who overpowered and destroyed the island. Boa was captured and taken to an island full of pirates. She was stripped and paraded around like a trophy, humiliated in front of crowds of pirates. Afterwards, they locked her in a cramped cell, where she began a harsh new life, forced to serve any pirate who came by, with no hope of escape.
